Solve Intelligence.title: Solve Intelligence
Solve Intelligence.description: Patent workflows — search patent and non-patent literature, legal texts, SEP technical standards, prior art, claim analysis.

Patent Connector.title: Patent Connector
Patent Connector.description: Authoritative patent, trademark and design data from first-party office APIs (USPTO, EPO, DPMA, EUIPO, USPTO TSDR): patent search, claims, full text, drawings, legal status, families, prosecution history, file wrappers and PDFs, office actions, PTAB, assignments, prior-art citations; US and EU trademark status plus EU registered designs. Built-in CPC/IPC/FI classifications and multi-office examination guidelines with semantic search, no extra credentials.

CourtListener.title: CourtListener
CourtListener.description: Free Law Project's legal research platform — millions of U.S. court opinions, PACER dockets, judge profiles, oral arguments, and citation verification.

Descrybe.title: Descrybe
Descrybe.description: Primary law research — search cases by concept or wording, find cases from citations, extract authorities, check treatment, verify quoted language.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.
